description_long: This dam structure features a large, curved retaining wall with a smooth, light wood-textured surface and a prominent black section, possibly representing a spillway or water channel. The top of the dam is lined with metal safety railings, providing secure access along the walkway. A staircase on one side leads up to the walkway, allowing for maintenance or inspection. The central section of the dam includes a rectangular opening, which may serve as an access point or inspection hatch. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, with clear separation between the water-retaining and overflow areas. The structure is robust and imposing, suitable for urban water management or recreational park settings.
description: A large, curved dam with a light wood-textured surface, black spillway section, metal railings, and a staircase for access. Features a central opening and robust, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved dam wall, central rectangular opening, and staircase with railings on the left.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the interior curve of the dam, the black spillway section, and the staircase leading up to the walkway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the dam, the walkway with railings, and the central opening.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view showing the other side of the curved dam wall, the black spillway, and the staircase from a different perspective.
